headline: Business Services & Supplies Stocks Q4 Recap: Benchmarking Copart (NASDAQ:CPRT)
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q4 behind us, let’s have a look at Copart (NASDAQ:CPRT) and its peers.
